title: Replace 'Luminia Gadgets' button with 'Connect With Us' scroll button

requirements.text: In the Navigation component, replace the 'Luminia Gadgets' button with a 'Connect With Us' button that smoothly scrolls to the Footer/Contact section when clicked.

quotes: Replace the Luminia Gadgets button with a Connect With Us button that scrolls/navigates to the Contact section when clicked.

acceptanceCriteria: The navigation bar no longer displays a 'Luminia Gadgets' button.
A 'Connect With Us' button is visible in the navigation bar.
Clicking 'Connect With Us' smoothly scrolls the page to the Footer/Contact section.
The button styling is consistent with the existing dark luxury design system.

constraints: Do not alter the overall dark obsidian luxury design system or color tokens.
Do not modify immutable frontend paths (useInternetIdentity, useActor, main.tsx, ui components).
nonGoals: Adding any new sections or pages.
Modifying the Footer contact links or alignment.
